items.quote: Pas uh 7.5 significant strikes per minute to 3.5 for Almea
the Baba Yaga aka Damen Pina is 100% takedown defense

items.quote: he's been in the Octagon less than a total of one round

items.claim: Damen Pinas's reliance on quick finishes makes him less effective if the fight goes into the second and third rounds.
items.quote: if we go into the second and third round, that'll work against Damen Pasc because he likes to get finishes quickly
